name: Thelma's Cranberry Pudding - Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
PUDDING: Dissolve baking soda in boiling water; Stir into flour, salt and molasses; blend. Fold in cranberries and nuts; Pour into greased bake pan and cover (can use coffee can covered with tin foil); Pour 1/2 cup water into crock pot and steam on high for 3 to 4 hours.
BUTTER SAUCE: Mix all ingredients and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until sugar dissolves. Spoon over pudding slices when serving. Note: The sweet butter sauce is a great compliment to the tart taste of the pudding.
